languages.text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_SeberianNoSword}Будь мой клинок при мне{/d}... Нет". {n}Себериан обрывает себя на полуслове.{/n} "Я был так ослеплен собственной гордыней, что забыл, в чем заключается истинная сила Вольного Торговца. Она — в людях, что верой и правдой служат династии. Вы — моя сила. Вы — клинок, который сразит Диодаса!"

traits.locale_text: [draft] Себериан сожалеет, что меч не при нем в первую секунду, потом говорит, что может даже и лучше без него, потому что это дало ему шанс услышать Ларию о положится на людей.

languages.text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_SeberianNoSword}If I had my blade on me{/d}... No." {n}Seberian cuts himself off.{/n} "I was so blinded by my own hubris that I forgot where the true power of the Rogue Trader lies. It is in the people who faithfully serve the dynasty. You are my strength. You are the blade that will slay Diodas af Irramon!"
languages.original_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_SeberianNoSword}Будь мой клинок при мне{/d}... Нет". {n}Себериан обрывает себя на полуслове.{/n} "Я был так ослеплен собственной гордыней, что забыл, в чем заключается истинная сила Вольного Торговца. Она — в людях, что верой и правдой служат династии. Вы — моя сила. Вы — клинок, который сразит Диодаса!"

"If I had my blade on me... No." {n}Seberian cuts himself off.{/n} "I was so blinded by my own hubris that I forgot where the true power of the Rogue Trader lies. It is in the people who faithfully serve the dynasty. You are my strength. You are the blade that will slay Diodas af Irramon!"

"If I had my blade on me... No." {n}Seberian cuts himself off.{/n} "I was so blinded by my own hubris that I forgot where the true power of the Rogue Trader lies. It is in the people who faithfully serve the dynasty. You are my strength. You are the blade that will slay Diodas af Irramon!"

languages.text: “{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_SeberianNoSword}如果我的剑还在身边{/d}……不。”{n}塞贝里安猛然打断自己。{/n}“我被自己的傲慢蒙蔽了双眼，忘记了行商浪人真正的力量所在。力量在于那些忠诚服务王朝的民众。你们才是我的力量。你们才是斩杀狄奥达斯·阿夫·伊拉蒙的利剑！”
languages.original_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_SeberianNoSword}If I had my blade on me{/d}... No." {n}Seberian cuts himself off.{/n} "I was so blinded by my own hubris that I forgot where the true power of the Rogue Trader lies. It is in the people who faithfully serve the dynasty. You are my strength. You are the blade that will slay Diodas af Irramon!"

traits.locale_text: “{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_SeberianNoSword}如果我的剑还在身边{/d}……不。”{n}塞贝里安猛然打断自己。{/n}“我被自己的傲慢蒙蔽了双眼，忘记了行商浪人真正的力量所在。力量在于那些忠诚服务王朝的民众。你们才是我的力量。你们才是斩杀狄奥达斯·阿夫·伊拉蒙的利剑！”

languages.text: « {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_SeberianNoSword}Si seulement j'avais mon épée{/d}... Non. {n}Seberian s'interrompt.{/n} Je me suis laissé aveugler par mon propre orgueil, au point d'en oublier la véritable source du pouvoir d'un libre-marchand : les serviteurs fidèles de la dynastie. Ma force, c'est vous. Vous serez la lame qui pourfendra Diodas af Irramon ! »
languages.original_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_SeberianNoSword}If I had my blade on me{/d}... No." {n}Seberian cuts himself off.{/n} "I was so blinded by my own hubris that I forgot where the true power of the Rogue Trader lies. It is in the people who faithfully serve the dynasty. You are my strength. You are the blade that will slay Diodas af Irramon!"

traits.locale_text: « {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_SeberianNoSword}Si seulement j'avais mon épée{/d}... Non. {n}Seberian s'interrompt.{/n} Je me suis laissé aveugler par mon propre orgueil, au point d'en oublier la véritable source du pouvoir d'un libre-marchand : les serviteurs fidèles de la dynastie. Ma force, c'est vous. Vous serez la lame qui pourfendra Diodas af Irramon ! »

languages.text: «{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_SeberianNoSword}Si tuviera mi hoja{/d}... No». {n}Seberian se interrumpe.{/n} «He estado tan cegado por mi arrogancia que he olvidado la verdadera fuente del poder de un Comerciante Independiente. Es la gente que sirve fielmente a la dinastía. Ustedes son mi fuerza. ¡Son la hoja que abatirá a Diodas af Irramon!».
languages.original_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_SeberianNoSword}If I had my blade on me{/d}... No." {n}Seberian cuts himself off.{/n} "I was so blinded by my own hubris that I forgot where the true power of the Rogue Trader lies. It is in the people who faithfully serve the dynasty. You are my strength. You are the blade that will slay Diodas af Irramon!"

traits.locale_text: «{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_SeberianNoSword}Si tuviera mi hoja{/d}... No». {n}Seberian se interrumpe.{/n} «He estado tan cegado por mi arrogancia que he olvidado la verdadera fuente del poder de un Comerciante Independiente. Es la gente que sirve fielmente a la dinastía. Ustedes son mi fuerza. ¡Son la hoja que abatirá a Diodas af Irramon!».

languages.text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_SeberianNoSword}Kılıcım yanımda olsaydı{/d}... Hayır." {n}Seberian, kendi sözünü kesiyor.{/n} "Kibrim yüzünden o kadar kör olmuştum ki Hür Tacir'in gerçek gücünün nerede yattığını unuttum. O güç, hanedanlığa sadakatle hizmet eden insanlardadır. Benim gücüm sizsiniz. Diodas af İrramon'u biçecek kılıç sizsiniz!"
languages.original_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_SeberianNoSword}If I had my blade on me{/d}... No." {n}Seberian cuts himself off.{/n} "I was so blinded by my own hubris that I forgot where the true power of the Rogue Trader lies. It is in the people who faithfully serve the dynasty. You are my strength. You are the blade that will slay Diodas af Irramon!"

Hayır." {n}Seberian, kendi sözünü kesiyor.{/n} "Kibrim yüzünden o kadar kör olmuştum ki Hür Tacir'in gerçek gücünün nerede yattığını unuttum. O güç, hanedanlığa sadakatle hizmet eden insanlardadır. Benim gücüm sizsiniz. Diodas af İrramon'u biçecek kılıç sizsiniz!"

languages.text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_SeberianNoSword}Hätte ich meine Klinge bei mir{/d} ... Nein." {n}Seberian hält inne.{/n} "Ich war von meiner eigenen Hybris derart geblendet, dass ich vergaß, wo die wahre Macht des Freihändlers liegt. Sie liegt in den Menschen, die der Dynastie treu dienen. Ihr seid meine Stärke. Ihr seid die Klinge, die Diodas af Irramon fällen wird!"
languages.original_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_SeberianNoSword}If I had my blade on me{/d}... No." {n}Seberian cuts himself off.{/n} "I was so blinded by my own hubris that I forgot where the true power of the Rogue Trader lies. It is in the people who faithfully serve the dynasty. You are my strength. You are the blade that will slay Diodas af Irramon!"

Nein." {n}Seberian hält inne.{/n} "Ich war von meiner eigenen Hybris derart geblendet, dass ich vergaß, wo die wahre Macht des Freihändlers liegt. Sie liegt in den Menschen, die der Dynastie treu dienen. Ihr seid meine Stärke. Ihr seid die Klinge, die Diodas af Irramon fällen wird!"

languages.text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_SeberianNoSword}もし私の剣が手元にあったら…いいえ。{/d} {n}セベリアンは自らを止める.{/n} 「私は自分の傲慢さにまどろみ、ローグトレーダーの真の力とは何なのかを忘れてしまった。それは、王朝に忠実に仕える人々にある。君たちは私の力。君たちはディオダス・ア・イルラモンを倒す剣だ！」
languages.original_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_SeberianNoSword}If I had my blade on me{/d}... You are my strength. You are the blade that will slay Diodas af Irramon!"
